g.title: SEM3
g.text: SEM-3 · Pure Seminoma — Stage IIA / IIB

g.title: rt
g.text: RT to para-aortic and ipsilateral iliac nodes

g.title: note
g.text: Shared decision-making for IIA/IIB (recurrence rates, dual-therapy potential).
Adjuvant chemo after RPLND is based on nonseminoma data (EP × 2; evolving).
